appraisal_events.evidence: — Est-ce que ce n'est pas duchesse de Guermantes dont vous avez la photographie sur la table ? — Mais si, c'est ma bonne tante.
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator confirms Robert’s close kinship with the highly prestigious duchesse de Guermantes, foregrounding Robert’s aristocratic standing through an explicit familial link.

status_effects.explanation: Robert’s local standing is elevated by the explicit revelation that the duchesse de Guermantes is his aunt, underscoring his elite social position.
